extension.description: Fetches private setup values from the famYT bridge and installs YouTube credentials, a TorBox API key for Fen Light, a4kSubtitles Patched account settings, Cocoscrapers filters, or everything at once.
extension.news:
v0.4.0 - Added Cocoscrapers undesirable filter installer
v0.3.0 - Added a4kSubtitles Patched settings installer
v0.2.0 - Added setup menu - Added TorBox API key installer for Fen Light
v0.1.0 - Initial famYT installer add-on
